---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
wd_path <- normalizePath(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(wd_path)
base_plot_folder <- "../plots/12_16/fluctuating_env/"
plot_n <- c(2, 8, 20, 50) # group sizes to plot for both models
plot_shift_sizes <- c(40,80,120) # shift sizes to plot for both models
regimes <- c("inv", "fit", "ext", "ave")  # "inv" = inverse variance model, "fit" = fittest individual model
plot_reps <- TRUE  # whether to plot individual replicate series 
hcl_color_palette <- "Dark 2" # color pattern for lines 
tick_seq <- 9970:10300 # ticks to plot
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
data_df <- readRDS("../r_data/fluctuate_env_constant_psi/data_summary.rds")
```

```{r}
data_df <- summary_stat_df
```

```{r}
reg = "ave"          # choose from "inv", "fit", "ext", "ave"
n = 50               # choose from 2, 8, 20, 50
shift_size = 120     # choose from 40, 80, 120
colname = "dz1"  # column to plot
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, colname, "/")

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (n in c(2,8,20,50)){
  for (gap in c(1,10,100)){
    for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)){
  for (reg in c("fit", "ext", "ave")){
      # for (reg in c("fit")){
        # for (opt in c(0, sz)){
          filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, fluctuate_gap = gap, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, fluctuate_gap = gap, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, fluctuate_gap = gap, n = n, shift_size = sz)
          png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          # filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz, optimum = opt, n = n)
          # png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, "_sz_", sz, "_opt_", opt, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          # filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, tick = 10000)
          # filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, tick = 10000)
          # filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, tick = 10000)
          # png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          title <- paste0(
          if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
              if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
              if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                  if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
          " model (n = ", n, ")"
          )

          
          par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1))

          plot_lines_multi(
              df      = data_df,
              filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
              ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
              labels  = list(
                  title = title,
                  x = "dz1 prediction",
                  y = "dz1 actual"      # or any y label you want
              ),
              show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
              cols = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3]
              ),
              # ylim = c(-5, 5),
              # xlim = c(-5, 5),
              xcol = "dz1_pred"
          )
          
          abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
                                          function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
          legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
              col = c(
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                  hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3]
              ),
              lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
          dev.off()
        # }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
data_df$dz1_pred_abs <- abs(data_df$dz1_pred)
data_df$dz1_abs <- abs(data_df$dz1)
```
